zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruth Hammond於1605年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可時，她的父親William Hammond26歲，母親Banadicus Gooch20歲。她於1622年與John Gooch在英國格盧斯特斯爾斯利布利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1673年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruth Hammond于1605年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可时，她的父亲William Hammond26岁，母亲Banadicus Gooch20岁。她于1622年与John Gooch在英国格盧斯特斯爾斯利布利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1673年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼威爾斯享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hammond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Ha(i)mon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. It frequently developed excrescent -d, giving Hamond, Haimund, and Hawmond. Alternatively, the name could derive from the Middle English personal name Hamund (Old Norse Hámundr, composed of the elements hár ‘high’ + mund ‘protection’), which may have been used in Normandy and in 12th-century eastern England, but the former explanation is more likely. The surname was sometimes confused with Almond and Ammon .

English: in the Bradford area of Yorkshire, the name is a shortened form of Ormondroyd, formerly Hamondesrode, from a lost place in Birstall (Yorkshire), named with the Middle English (Old French) personal name Hamon (1 above) + Middle English roid, a southern Yorkshire pronunciation of Old English rod ‘clearing’.
Irish: generally an importation from England, but occasionally an adopted name for Mac Ámoinn, see McCammon .

variants.name: Hammonds
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Hammond , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Almond
meanings: English:
from the Middle English personal name Almund, in which Old English Æthelmund ‘noble protector’ and Ealhmund ‘temple protector’ have coalesced.
variant of   Allman   and   Allmand   both meaning ‘German’, assimilated by folk etymology to the vocabulary word denoting the tree.

variants.name: Hammett
meanings: English (southwestern England, especialy Devon): from the Middle English personal name Hamet, a pet form of ancient Germanic Hamo (see Hammond 1).

variants.name: Hamon
meanings: Breton, French, and English (Channel Islands): from the Breton, Old French, Middle English personal name Hamon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. See also Hammond .

variants.name: Hamlin
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, from the Norman French and Middle English personal name Hamelin, a double diminutive of Hamo (see Hammond ).
French: variant of   Hamelin   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
Americanized form of Finnish Hämäläinen (see Hamalainen ).

variants.name: Hampson
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): patronymic from the Norman personal name Hamo, Hamon (see Hammond ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAmhsaigh ‘descendant of Amhsach’ a byname meaning ‘mercenary soldier’ or ‘messenger’, from the adjective amhasach ‘aggressive’.

variants.name: Haimes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yacov, Yosef.

English: variant, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, of Haime, of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Haim (ancient Germanic Haimo, from haim- ‘home’), often Latinized as Hamo. Compare Hammond .
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Hammon
meanings: English (Middlesex and Ken): variant of   Hammond  .

nameMeanings.name: Ruth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (of uncertain derivation) of a Moabite woman who left her own people to remain with her mother-in-law Naomi, and afterwards became the wife of Boaz and an ancestress of David. Her story is told in the book of the Bible that bears her name. It was used among the Puritans in England in the 16th century, partly because of its association with the English vocabulary word ruth meaning ‘compassion’. It has always been popular as a Jewish name, but is now also widespread among people of many different cultures and creeds.

variants.name: Rut
meanings: Biblical. See Ruth .

en.lifeSummary: When Ruth Hammond was born in 1605, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Hammond, was 26 and her mother, Banadicus Gooch, was 20. She married John Gooch in 1622, in Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1673, in Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruth Hammond est née en 1605, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Hammond, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Banadicus Gooch, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Gooch en 1622, à Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1673, à Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 68 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruth Hammond è nata il nel 1605 nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Hammond, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Banadicus Gooch, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Gooch nel 1622, nel Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1673, nel Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ruth Hammondが1605年にイギリスイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父William Hammondは26歳，母Banadicus Goochは20歳であった。1622年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスリンブリッジでJohn Goochと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1673年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーウエルズで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruth Hammond(이)가 1605년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hammond(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Banadicus Gooch(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1622년 영국 그루스스터실르 슬림브리지에서 John Gooch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1673년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 웰스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruth Hammond nasceu em 1605, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Hammond, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Banadicus Gooch, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Gooch em 1622, em Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1673, em Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruth Hammond родилась в 1605 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Hammond было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Banadicus Gooch, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Gooch в 1622 г. в местности слимбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1673 г. в местности веллс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruth Hammond nació en 1605, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Hammond, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Banadicus Gooch, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Gooch en 1622, en Slimbridge, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1673, en Wells, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años.
